title: BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez | Bacardi 10 Year Old Rum | Extra Dark Gold Rum | BACARDÍ Global
clean_text: BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez | Bacardi 10 Year Old Rum | Extra Dark Gold Rum | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS COCKTAILS DIEZ NEAT EXTRA RARE DARK GOLD RUM BACARDÍ GRAN RESERVA DIEZ Expertly blended. Barrel-aged for a minimum of ten years under the Caribbean sun. Then filtered through charcoal for a smooth finish. THE TASTE OF TIME Tasting Notes Discover bright notes of stone fruits, banana and pear balanced with caramelized vanilla and oak. Nose Almond and peach Palate Banana, pear and vanilla Finish Pineapple and cinnamon ‘Diez’ refers to this delectable sipping rum’s ten-year aging process. OUR RECOMMENDED RUMS LIKE THIS? TRY THESE If you enjoy this rum, here’s our recommendations of other BACARDĺ rums we think you’ll like VIEW OUR RUMS BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ SPICED BACARDÍ AÑEJO CUATRO BACARDÍ RESERVA OCHO BACARDÍ RESERVA LIMITADA VIEW OUR RUMS EXPLORE THE ANGEL'S SHARE Under the warmth of the Caribbean sun, some golden liquid vanishes to the heavens. Michael B. Jordan’s cinematic film explores the angels’ love of BACARDÍ. DISCOVER MORE MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW FAQ CURIOUS ABOUT RUM? WHAT IS AGED RUM? Rum can be aged anywhere from one year upwards. Aging rum can add additional complexity to its flavour and mouthfeel. HOW LONG IS BACARDÍ GRAN RESERVA DIEZ AGED FOR? This rum is aged for at least 10 years. WHAT IS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN DARK, GOLD AND WHITE RUM? Rum is a wonderfully complex and diverse spirit. Colour can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavours that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But colour can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself.
